title: How to setup your Keyboard & Mouse

messages.content: # Don’t have a controller or a wheel but only a keyboard? Follow this guide!

## Setup Guide
> Open Content Manager and go to Settings > Assetto Corsa > Controls > Keyboard & Mouse > Main
> Next, bind every button in the green boxes.
> If you want to use your mouse, check **”Enable Mouse Steering”**
> **If your wheel is moving on its own during the game without any input, try turning down your mouse's polling rate.**
